name: ARC.R
description: A more heavily armed TAYZ.T variant built to punish from range with static energy. It is one of the roughest threats in the Pond Lab and the Assistant Manager fight.
respawnInfo: It does not respawn once destroyed.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Hit: 40
Ranged Shot: 45
Charged Shot: 70
Overload Shock: 55

specialTraits: It is immune to shock damage, bleed, gas hazard, poison, and venom. Its overload shock also slows stamina recovery for a time. The Gold Card drops once all world ARC.R units are destroyed, excluding the Assistant Manager summons.

attacks.name: Hit
attacks.tell: It closes the distance and strikes with a short contact arm.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or stay far enough away to force its ranged game.
attacks.notes: A simple hit once it is already on top of you.

attacks.name: Ranged Shot
attacks.tell: It charges a static ball and fires it toward your position.
attacks.howToAvoid: It is not meant to be reliably blocked; the right answer is leaving the line.
attacks.notes: This is the ARC.R signature move and the main thing that changes the duel compared with other robots.

attacks.name: Charged Shot
attacks.tell: It holds the charge longer before releasing a much stronger bolt.
attacks.howToAvoid: Strafe sideways and use lab cover if available.

attacks.name: Overload Shock
attacks.tell: If you stay too close, it stores energy and bursts in a close-range shockwave.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back away as soon as you see the charge-up; the radius is short but punishing.
attacks.notes: Applies the microstamina debuff on top of the hit.

behavior: It patrols like a TAYZ.T, but prefers opening at range with static shots before following into melee. If the target stays too close, it swaps into an overload burst to blow them off.
interactionWithPlayer: The moment it sees you, it tries to tag you with a static orb and then pressure with melee or overload. It is one of those enemies that forces you to respect spacing in tight labs.
interactionWithCreatures: It attacks any intruder in its lab space and coordinates cleanly with TAYZ.T and RUZ.T during a fight.
strategy: Sour, salty, and busting remain excellent. The real key is never giving it clean projectile lines: use columns, doors, or diagonals and do not try to treat its shot like a normal melee hit.
